Event: Royal Challenge - Season 50
Event Date: 01/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI331
Citadel Signet Ring

Once in a while, the unit places a Mark of Death upon 3 random enemy units for 4 sec. If the targets die within 4 sec. after receiving a Mark of Death, they will be unable to be resurrected for 4 sec. Every second for 4 sec., the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them receive 400000 magic damage. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. If the units bearing the Mark of Death have their health drop below 35%, they explode and receive 550000 pure damage. The explosion triggers at most once every 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
